wakame.name: Wakame
instructions: Place 1 ounce wakame (dried seaweed) in a medium bowl; cover with boiling water and let sit until softened, about 10 minutes. Drain seaweed, squeeze out excess water, and coarsely chop.

warm-artichoke-olive-dip.name: Warm Artichoke-olive Dip
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Coarsely chop artichokes and 3/4 cup basil in processor. Transfer mixture to 4-cup baking dish; mix in Parmesan, tapenade, and herb cheese. Bake until hot, about 30 minutes. Garnish with basil. Serve with breads.

watermelon-smoothie-cooler.name: Watermelon Smoothie Cooler
instructions: Place ice and sugar in a blender; blend until slushy, 1 to 2 minutes. Add watermelon; blend until smooth.
Garnish servings with spearmint leaves.

wedge-salad-with-tahini-ranch.name: Wedge Salad With Tahini Ranch

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, or 2 heads of romaine, quartered lengthwise

ingredients.item: Torn mixed tender herbs (such as basil

instructions: Whisk garlic, yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl until incorporated and smooth. Season dressing with kosher salt and lots of black pepper (it should look speckled).
Toss lettuce and vinegar in a large bowl; season with kosher salt. Add mixed herbs and give it all another toss.
Spread dressing over plates and top with salad. Sprinkle with seeds, chives, Aleppo-style pepper, and sea salt and drizzle with a little oil.

whipped-cashew-sambal-sauce-with-broccol.name: Whipped Cashew-sambal Sauce With Broccolini

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: dark and pale green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Place 1 cup raw cashews in a small saucepan and pour in water to cover by 1". Bring to a boil, then remove from heat and let sit until cashews are tender, at least 30 minutes and up to 1 day. Cover and chill if soaking longer than 2 hours.

Drain cashews and transfer to a blender (preferably high-speed) or food processor (sauce will not be quite as creamy). Add one 1" piece ginger, peeled, coarsely chopped, 2 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, preferably low-sodium, 1 Tbsp. honey, 1 Tbsp. sambal oelek, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt (if using low-sodium soy sauce), and ⅓ cup water and purée until very smooth, about 4 minutes (makes about 1¼ cups).
Do ahead: Sauce can be made 4 days ahead. Cover and chill. Loosen with a splash of water and season with more salt if needed before using.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Arrange 2 bunches broccolini (about 1 lb.), trimmed, halved lengthwise, in a single layer in skillet and season with a large pinch of kosher salt. Cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, about 4 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and continue to cook, tossing occasionally with tongs, until broccolini is charred in spots and crisp-tender, 6–8 minutes longer. Season with freshly ground pepper; taste and season with more salt if needed.
Spread sauce on plates or a large platter; arrange broccolini on top. Scatter 4 scallions, dark and pale green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal, over.

white-bean-shredded-chicken-chili.name: White Bean Shredded Chicken Chili
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Saute onion and garlic in the hot oil until tender, about 5 minutes.'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Add cumin and continue cooking for 1 minute.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Stir in chicken broth, scraping the bottom of pot with a wooden spoon.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Add chicken, beans, chiles, oregano, salt, and cayenne to the pot and bring to a simmer.'}
{'step': '6', 'instruction': 'Continue simmering, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes.'}

white-chocolate-and-cinnamon-mousse-lezz.name: White Chocolate And Cinnamon Mousse
instructions: 1. A pleasant dessert that can be prepared for muarfiler among recipes.
2. Cook until you join the mixer and wait in the refrigerator.
3. Divide chocolates into small parts and take it to glass bowl.
4. Place the bowl on a pot with boiling water.
5. Wait until the chocolate melt.
6. After roasting chocolate, wait until it comes to room heat.
7. Add and mix rom and cinnamon into hot water.
8. Wrap eggs yellow in a separate bowl with whisk wire.
9. Pour the egg yolk and cinnamon mixture into chocolate.
10. Add and mix it.
11. 11. Share the mixture into service blocks.
12. Wait for a night in the refrigerator.
12. August Decorate and serve on it.

white-chocolate-cherry-mousse-pie.name: White Chocolate-cherry Mousse Pie
instructions: Stir chocolate in medium metal bowl set over saucepan of simmering water until melted and smooth. Remove bowl. Place sheet of waxed paper on work surface. Pour chocolate onto paper. Working quickly and using offset spatula, spread chocolate in thin layer over paper into 10x10-inch square. Place second sheet of waxed paper over, pressing to release most air bubbles. Roll paper up tightly into 3/4-inch-wide roll and chill until set, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 5 days ahead. Wrap in plastic and keep chilled. See our slideshow on How to Make Dark Chocolate Shards.

Stir cherries and preserves in medium saucepan over medium-high heat until preserves melt and mixture begins to simmer. Reduce heat to medium and continue to simmer until cherries begin to soften, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Stir in almond extract. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm slightly before serving.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Lightly coat 9-inch-diameter glass pie dish with nonstick spray. Process broken cookies, sugar, and pinch of salt in processor until cookies are finely ground. Add melted butter; using on/off turns, process until incorporated. Press firmly and evenly onto bottom and up sides of prepared dish.
Bake crust until firm, about 12 minutes. Transfer pie dish to rack; cool completely.
Place 2 tablespoons water in small bowl. Sprinkle gelatin over; let stand until softened, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, stir 3/4 cup cream and white chocolate in small saucepan over medium-low heat until chocolate is smooth. Remove from heat. Add gelatin mixture; stir until dissolved. Transfer to large bowl. Stir in 3/4 cup cream. Refrigerate just until chilled but not set, stirring occasionally, about 1 hour.

Using electric mixer, beat chilled white chocolate mixture until firm peaks form. Fold in chopped cherries. Using clean dry beaters, beat egg whites in medium bowl until foamy. Add almond extract and pinch of salt and continue beating until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in sugar. Continue beating until stiff peaks form. Add egg white mixture to white chocolate mixture; fold just to incorporate.

Spoon white chocolate mousse into cooled crust, mounding in center. Unroll dark chocolate shards from waxed-paper roll (chocolate will break into long, curved pieces when paper is opened). Arrange shards decoratively atop mousse. Chill until mousse is set, at least 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover with cake dome and keep chilled.
Cut pie into wedges and serve with warm cherry compote.

white-christmas-candy.name: White Christmas Candy
instructions: Mix white chocolate chips and peanut butter together in a large microwave-safe bowl.
Microwave on high for 1 minute; stir with a spatula. Continue cooking in microwave in 30 second intervals; stir until smooth. Fold in rice cereal, marshmallows, and peanuts.
Drop white chocolate mixture by spoonfuls onto a sheet of waxed paper. Sprinkle each mound with sprinkles. Set aside to cool for 30 minutes.

white-onion-fennel-and-watercress-salad.name: White Onion, Fennel, And Watercress Salad
instructions: Soak onion in a bowl of ice water 30 minutes; drain.
Toast fennel seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until golden, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and coarsely chop.
Toss onion, fennel bulb, watercress, and vinegar in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper, add oil and fennel seeds, and toss again to coat.

wilted-collards.name: Wilted Collards
instructions: Place bacon in a large, deep pot; cook and stir over medium-high heat until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Cook and stir collard greens, onion, garlic, and sugar into the cooked bacon. Cover pot and let mixture steam until collard greens are wilted, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove cover, raise heat to high, and cook until liquid is evaporated, about 5 minutes.

wind-vane-lezzet.name: Wind Vane
instructions: 1. Take the sugar and water pot and boil.
2. Add and mix the lemon juice and leave it cool from the stove.
3. thoroughly knead and relax the necessary materials for dough.
4. Open the dough to be very thin with the roller.
5. Cut rounds from the dough with the mouth part of the tea cup.
6. Wrap the five apartments in the form of roll in a row to the half of the other.
7. From the middle of the full and the index to the oiled paper serial tray.
8. Bake up to 180 degrees fry on the oven.
9. Transfer the desserts into the tribute and serve as you pull the tribute.

wolfgang-pucks-cheeseburger-sliders.name: Wolfgang Puck's Cheeseburger Sliders
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill or grill pan for medium-high heat (400 to 232°C/200 to 230 degrees C) and lightly oil the grate.
Combine mayonnaise, red onion, ketchup, vinegar, capers, parsley, thyme, and sugar in a small bowl. Set aside.

Mix beef, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper in a large bowl by hand until just combined. Make 12 meatballs using your hands; transfer to a baking sheet. Flatten meatballs slightly. Drizzle with oil; season both sides with remaining each 3/4 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper.

Grill patties on the preheated grill, uncovered, for 3 minutes. Flip; top each patty with 1 quartered piece cheese. Grill, uncovered, until cheese is melted and beef is cooked through, about 2 minutes. Grill buns, cut-sides down, until toasted, about 1 minute.
Top bun bottoms with a small spoonful sauce; add 1 patty, shredded lettuce, tomato slices, cornichon slices, and top bun to each.

wow-sweet-and-sour-sauce.name: Wow! Sweet And Sour Sauce
instructions: Stir water, sugar, ketchup, pineapple, vinegar, red pepper flakes, soy sauce, steak sauce, and hot sauce together in a saucepan over medium heat. Remove 1/2 cup of the sauce to a small bowl; whisk cornstarch into the sauce in the bowl. Bring the sauce in the saucepan to a boil, stir the sauce with the cornstarch into the boiling sauce. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly before using.
